name: Omni Analytics
description: Omni Analytics — BI and data exploration platform with SQL-first semantic modeling layer and embedded analytics.

seo.title: Omni Analytics — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Omni Analytics: Omni Analytics — BI and data exploration platform with SQL-first semantic modeling layer and embedded analytics.

when_to_use: SQL-first semantic modeling layer for consistent business metrics
Embedded analytics for SaaS products with white-label dashboards
Self-serve data exploration with collaborative workbook sharing
Connecting directly to Snowflake or BigQuery for live queries
BI platform balancing SQL power with no-code exploration

pros: SQL-first modeling familiar to data engineers
Embedded analytics part of core offering
Founders from Looker and Stitch bring pedigree
cons: Young product still filling feature gaps
Smaller community than Looker or Metabase
Pricing at scale not yet fully transparent
BI market already crowded and noisy
review.verdict: Promising Looker alternative built by the right people, but still early in its product maturation.
review.best_for: Data teams wanting SQL-first semantic modeling without Looker's lock-in
review.not_for: Orgs wanting the safety of a fully mature BI platform today
